title: Deseada
writer: José Baviera, Roberto Gavaldón, Eduardo Marquina
actors: Dolores del Rio, Jorge Mistral, José Baviera
plot: Deseada, a woman living in the modern city of Chichen Itza, tries to assuage her sister's dread of her betrothal to a Spaniard she doesn't really know. However, when he arrives in the city, he and Deseada fall in love before he ha...
